pi_items.source: task.json description field explicitly states 'Date: February 14, 2025'
WebSearch verified Shiitake is a real mushroom species (Lentinula edodes) widely cultivated in agriculture. LE-46 is a commercial strain.

WebSearch confirmed LE-46 is a well-known Shiitake strain from multiple commercial suppliers (Fungi Ally, Midwest Magic Mushroom, Revival Mushroom, Field Forest). Known for fast spawn run and superior log inoculation performance.

WebSearch confirmed red oak is one of the best wood species for Shiitake log cultivation. OSU Factsheet indicates red oak is a favorite substrate for mycelium growth and has similar or superior performance to white oak.

WebSearch confirmed crib formation is a real stacking method for mushroom logs. Uses alternating perpendicular layers for space efficiency during spawn run, commonly used in Northeastern US Shiitake production.
task.json description explicitly states 'Quantity 1: Value: 50, Label: logs inoculated'
task.json description explicitly states 'Quantity 2: Value: 5.5, Label: sawdust spawn used, Unit: lbs'. WebSearch confirms 5.5 lbs is a standard commercial spawn bag size.
task.json description field explicitly states 'Log Type: Activity'. farmOS Field Kit supports Activity logs as a log type for farm operations.
WebSearch confirmed Shiitake is a real gourmet mushroom species widely cultivated commercially and for home production.

pi_items.verified_value: Log inoculation with sawdust spawn sealed with cheese wax is a verified agricultural practice
pi_items.source: WebSearch confirmed: OSU and Cornell resources document log inoculation using sawdust spawn, with food-grade (cheese) wax sealing technique as standard practice in commercial Shiitake production.

pi_items.verified_value: farmOS Field Kit is a real open-source agricultural app
pi_items.source: WebSearch confirmed farmOS Field Kit is a real Progressive Web App and native app for farm management and logging, licensed under GNU GPL, with official GitHub repository.

privileged_info_summary: This task involves creating an Activity log in the farmOS Field Kit agricultural app for a real mushroom cultivation practice. The log documents inoculation of 50 red oak logs with Shiitake LE-46 strain (a well-established commercial strain from multiple suppliers) using 5.5 lbs of sawdust spawn sealed with cheese wax. All referenced agricultural practices are verified: red oak is a confirmed substrate for Shiitake, LE-46 is a real strain known for superior log cultivation performance, sawdust spawn with wax sealing is standard technique, and crib formation is a documented storage method. The date February 14, 2025 is explicitly specified in task requirements.
